data.title: Viveka Health obtains HITRUST e1 Certification with help from Palindrome Technologies - a milestone in cybersecurity commitment.
data.description: Viveka Health, a top AI-powered health benefits administration platform, has proudly attained the HITRUST e1 Certification with the help of its key partnership with Palindrome Technologies. The noteworthy accomplishment was made public on January 26, 2026, in Princeton, N.J. This certification underscores Viveka Health's commitment to data security and compliance.

data.title: 1 in 10 Gen Zers seek STI diagnosis from AI chatbots like ChatGPT, despite frequent misdiagnoses.
data.description: In recent findings from Seattle on Jan. 26, 2026, it was revealed that the younger generation known as Gen Z is relying more on AI technology like ChatGPT for seeking information on sexually transmitted infections (STIs). A recent survey indicated that youngsters are utilizing AI chatbots for guidance on STIs and other sexual health queries. However, concerns have been raised about the accuracy of the diagnoses provided by these AI tools, with a significant number of cases reporting misdiagnoses among Gen Z individuals.

data.title: Genethon in Paris advances gene therapies for rare genetic diseases, focusing on Duchenne muscular dystrophy.
data.description: French-based company Genethon announces significant advancements in gene therapies for previously incurable diseases such as Duchenne muscular dystrophy. They have made breakthroughs in this field, demonstrating promising outcomes for patients. This development signifies a major step forward in the treatment of genetic disorders, with potential to impact the lives of millions.

data.title: U.S. stock futures fell as investors prepare for mega-cap earnings. Market indices down, with 10-year Treasury bond at 4.21%. Notable stocks include BKR up 3.74% and SRPT up 6.72%. Fed likely to keep interest rates steady. Dow Jones -0.12%, S&P 500 -0.24%, Nasdaq 100 -0.44%, Russell 2000 -0.29%. SPY down 0.22% to $687.69, QQQ declined 0.43% to $620.04.
data.description: U.S. stock futures fell on Monday following a mixed close on Friday, with major benchmark indices dropping. Investors are focusing on earnings reports from companies like UnitedHealth Group, General Motors, Microsoft, Meta Platforms, Tesla, and Starbucks. The Federal Reserve's decision on interest rates is awaited on Wednesday, with market data showing a 97.2% likelihood of rates remaining unchanged in January. The 10-year Treasury bond had a yield of 4.21% while the two-year bond was at 3.59%. Index performance saw the Dow Jones down 0.12%, S&P 500 down 0.24%, Nasdaq 100 down 0.44%, and Russell 2000 down 0.29%. ETFs tracking these indices were lower in premarket trading. Stocks in focus included Baker Hughes, up 3.74% after beating earnings estimates, and Sarepta Therapeutics, rising 6.72% after progress with its ultra-rare disease therapies. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Metaplanet boosts 2026 forecast after writing down over $680M in Bitcoin. Sales set to double with rising revenue.
data.description: Metaplanet, a company in Japan specializing in Bitcoin treasury, has increased its revenue and profit projections for 2025. They anticipate a significant growth in sales for 2026, almost doubling the current figures. This rise is attributed to the expansion of their Bitcoin income and treasury strategy, signaling a positive outlook for the company's future financial performance.

data.title: EcoOnline names David Orstad as CCO with 25 years experience in customer organizations. Trusted by over 11,000 organizations worldwide.
data.description: EcoOnline, a prominent worldwide supplier of safety and sustainability software, has named David Orstad as the Chief Customer Officer (CCO). Orstad brings over 25 years of experience in overseeing customer organizations in the SaaS and private equity-backed sectors. His appointment comes as EcoOnline expands globally, aiming to strengthen its position as a vital, enduring ally for customers. The company serves more than 11,000 organizations in multiple countries.

data.title: Trade Nation will rebrand TD365 platform, enhancing customer experience, with transition to single brand.
data.description: In London on January 26, 2026, a well-known FCA regulated fintech and financial services company, Trade Nation, announced its acquisition of TD365. The transition will involve rebranding TD365 under the Trade Nation name, aimed at improving the customer experience by streamlining login processes.

data.title: $1.7B crypto funds outflows, highest since Nov 2025. ETPs saw reversal last week; Bitcoin, Ether led outflows as altcoins gained.
data.description: Last week, Crypto Exchange Traded Products (ETPs) experienced a shift in direction as there were net outflows. The leading cryptocurrencies, Bitcoin and Ether, saw the most significant outflows as negative market sentiment prevailed. In contrast, alternative cryptocurrencies like Solana witnessed inflows. The outflows from Bitcoin and Ether were notably high compared to the inflows into altcoins, indicating a shift in investor preferences towards alternative digital assets.

data.title: CICC participates in 19th Asian Financial Forum in Hong Kong on Jan. 26, 2026. Wang Shuguang from CICC attends.
data.description: The 19th Asian Financial Forum (AFF) took place in Hong Kong on January 26, 2026. Co-hosted by the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region Government and the Hong Kong Trade Development Council, this event marked the region's inaugural financial assembly of the year. China International Capital Corporation Limited (CICC) participated as a partner, emphasizing its commitment to the forum. Wang Shuguang, Vice Chairman, President, and Management Committee Member of CICC, was in attendance at the prestigious event.
